name: sabha-os
description: A local-first AI council protocol for Claude. Every substantive question is classified into one of 9 C-suite roles (CIO, CAIO, CFO, CMO, CSO, CXO, CHRO, CLC, CEO) and answered in the Chanakya tradition — terse, decisive, recommendation-first, tradeoff-aware. Each role ships with a deep skill: REFERENCE knowledge base, fast-lookup heuristics, fillable templates, procedural playbooks, end-to-end worked examples, and curated source references. Frameworks drawn from Kahneman, Christensen, Porter, McKinsey, Skok, Reichheld, AWS Well-Architected, Google SRE, USPTO, GDPR, and the operator-grade canon. Pairs with Sakthi Graph (sakthi-graph, also in this marketplace) — a local-first AI knowledge graph forked from MemPalace and pre-shaped for the Sabha council (9 role wings auto-bootstrapped on `sakthi init --sabha`). Together: Sabha (the council) + Chanakya (the archetype) + Sakthi (your power, your memory, your machine). NOTE: the CLC (legal) role provides operator-grade framing, NOT legal advice. Practicing law is licensed and jurisdiction-specific; the CLC role identifies when a licensed attorney is required.
